---
title: "Course Chapters"
subtitle: "Generated chapter and section index"
---

# Chapter Map

Use `chapters/` as the canonical content source. Each section owns three
outputs:

```text
chapters/
  chapter-NN/
    index.qmd
    sections/
      NN-section-slug/
        video-lesson-slides.qmd
        web-notes.qmd
        pdf-notes.qmd
```

The directory tree is the router. Run `scripts/sync-section-structure.sh` after
adding, renaming, or removing section folders.

# Chapters

## Chapter 01. Backtesting and Automated Execution

- [Overview](chapter-01/index.qmd)
- 1.1 Backtesting as a Research Loop: [video](chapter-01/sections/01-backtesting-as-research-loop/video-lesson-slides.qmd), [web](chapter-01/sections/01-backtesting-as-research-loop/web-notes.qmd), [PDF](chapter-01/sections/01-backtesting-as-research-loop/pdf-notes.qmd)
- 1.2 Net Returns and Costs: [video](chapter-01/sections/02-net-returns-costs/video-lesson-slides.qmd), [web](chapter-01/sections/02-net-returns-costs/web-notes.qmd), [PDF](chapter-01/sections/02-net-returns-costs/pdf-notes.qmd)

# Authoring Convention

- Create one folder per chapter: `chapters/chapter-02/`.
- Put the chapter landing page at `chapters/chapter-02/index.qmd`.
- Put each section under `chapters/chapter-02/sections/NN-section-slug/`.
- Include `video-lesson-slides.qmd`, `web-notes.qmd`, and `pdf-notes.qmd` in
  every section folder.
- Run `scripts/sync-section-structure.sh`; do not hand-edit generated routing.
